The '''Battle of Baltizaar''' was an attack on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Baltizaar/Legends|Baltizaar]] by the [[Bando Gora/Legends|Bando Gora]], a coven of [[The Force/Legends|Force]]-worshiping criminals.

==The battle==
The [[Planet/Legends|planet]] nearly fell to the cult's onslaught. The [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] requested the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] intervene in the attack, and a task force was sent to the planet. The force took several casualties, but eventually forced the [[Bando Gora/Legends|Bando Gora]] off the planet.

==Aftermath==
During the battle, the Bando Gora took [[Komari Vosa]] and two other [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] as prisoners-of-war and held them hostage in their castle on [[Kohlma]].<ref name="Star Wars: Bounty Hunter">''[[Star Wars: Bounty Hunter]]''</ref> Vosa and the Jedi were brutally [[Torture/Legends|tortured]], and she eventually fell to the [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side of the Force]], becoming the leader of the Bando Gora after escaping her [[Prison/Legends|prison]] and killing two fellow prisoners.

Vosa's eventual dark-side leadership, combined with [[Qui-Gon Jinn/Legends|Qui-Gon Jinn's]] rogue-Jedi reputation that would end in his murder by a [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lord]], would serve as the culminating impetus for [[Count/Legends|Count]] [[Dooku/Legends|Dooku's]] departure from the Jedi Order.<ref name="DP" />

==Behind the scenes==
The Battle of Baltizaar was originally placed in [[39 BBY/Legends|39 BBY]] by [[Jedi vs. Sith: The Essential Guide to the Force (real-life book)|''Jedi vs. Sith: The Essential Guide to the Force'']]. However, the more recent [[Darth Plagueis (novel)|''Darth Plagueis'']] novel places the battle in [[33 BBY/Legends|33 BBY]], shortly before [[Darth Maul/Legends|Darth Maul's]] [[Darth Maul/Legends#Sabotage on Dorvalla|assignment to Dorvalla]].
